subject: New Opening: Backend Engineer
body:
Hi there,

I wanted to share an exciting opportunity that just came in from Statsportalen, a company in the public sector space.

They are scaling their engineering team and are looking for a Backend Engineer to join on a contract basis.

What they're looking for:

  • Java
  • AWS
  • DynamoDB
  • Pub/Sub

Practical details:

  • Start: 2022-09-12
  • Duration: 12 months
  • Location: Göteborg (hybrid)
  • Rate: up to 850 SEK/h

If this sounds like a fit, or you know someone who might be – reach out!

Best regards,
Lena Eriksson
Business Director
TechLink Sweden
Tel: +46 73 345 67 89
